subject: chore(data): add four-ems and sun-sea-o repos to tracking
body:
Add two missing devmade-ai repos to config/repos.json and re-run
extraction + aggregation. Both repos have pending commits awaiting
AI analysis via the feed-the-chicken workflow.

- four-ems: 109 commits extracted (5 batches pending)
- sun-sea-o: 80 commits extracted (4 batches pending)
